title: Riddle me this EVA Fans
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] Riddle me this EVA Fans? Post by Ryukin75 » Tue Jun 01, 2010 3:44 pm SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Riddle me this EVA Fans? Post by sephirotic » Tue Jun 01, 2010 4:00 pm Ryukin75 wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: why so rude dude... Post by Ryukin75 » Tue Jun 01, 2010 4:19 pm This is just a discussion about an anime why so hostile? I say this because it's the same creature sitting in a shallow grave on the moon as in the first movie. You need to chill, it's a cartoon. Where did you get your degree?

[]: Re: why so rude dude... Post by sephirotic » Tue Jun 01, 2010 4:22 pm Ryukin75 wrote: This is just a discussion about an anime why so hostile? I say this because it's the same creature sitting in a shallow grave on the moon as in the first movie. You need to chill, it's a cartoon. Where did you get your degree?

[]: Post by ZapX » Tue Jun 01, 2010 4:27 pm I don't see anything remotely hostile in that post. I'd say you need to take your own advice and chill. If that post offended you that much (which it shouldn't have at all), I'd hate to see what your reaction is when some of the other members respond. Relax.

[]: Re: Riddle me this EVA Fans? Post by Ryukin75 » Tue Jun 01, 2010 4:28 pm sephirotic wrote: You mean MARK-VI. Why is obvious that he is "Adam"? There is 4 angels seen in the second impact, not one single adam anymore, just because it uses a maks doesn´t mean it isn´t a cloned eva to start with. it can be a clone of lillith just like 01 like its mask may sugest.

[]: Post by ZapX » Tue Jun 01, 2010 4:32 pm You're dealing with a person whose first language isn't English. Now, if you're going to continue to be so discourteous to other members, your stay here isn't going to last long. Again, RELAX .

[]: Re: Riddle me this EVA Fans? Post by Ryukin75 » Tue Jun 01, 2010 4:37 pm sephirotic wrote: You mean MARK-VI. Why is obvious that he is "Adam"? There is 4 angels seen in the second impact, not one single adam anymore, just because it uses a maks doesn´t mean it isn´t a cloned eva to start with. it can be a clone of lillith just like 01 like its mask may sugest.

[]: Post by Wissenschaft » Tue Jun 01, 2010 6:48 pm perhaps we could get to talking about your original post? We have no reason to consider mark-6 as anything more than another eva. One being piloted by Kaworu Nagisa who seems to still be an angel.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 01, 2010 11:52 pm We have a gabillion preexisting threads where Eva-06 discussion can go and this one is off to a bad start anywhere, so I'm locking it.
